title: Add reconcile and doctor timers
goal: Add hardened user-level systemd units for periodic Bureau reconciliation and read-only health reporting without registry mutation or destructive repair.

metadata.safety_boundary: local systemd units only; no autonomous dispatch

acceptance.assertion: A Bureau reconcile service/timer exists with minimal privileges and writes only to the configured Bureau state root.
A read-only doctor/reporting service/timer exists and records health without deleting or repairing unknown files by default.
Operations documentation explains install, status inspection, journal inspection, disable and rollback commands.
